overall.description: Atmospheric game engine footage depicting a foggy abandoned industrial yard with a red warehouse building, transitioning via a hard cut to a dense misty forest interior. The footage features heavy atmospheric fog, low light conditions, and a somber, mysterious ambiance typical of survival horror games.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned industrial yard with red warehouse

agents.ego_description: standing still in the foggy industrial yard, observing the abandoned surroundings and the red warehouse building

entered.detail: large red industrial warehouse with KALEVALA signage on the upper facade
single orange and white traffic cone sitting in the middle of the gravel path
dark metal fence or barrier structure in the foreground left
tall evergreen trees visible through the heavy fog in the background

segments.scene_description: A static view of a foggy industrial yard dominated by a large red warehouse building on the right with KALEVALA signage. An orange traffic cone sits in the center of the gravel ground, while tall evergreen trees loom in the foggy background. The atmosphere is still and desolate with low visibility due to heavy fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense coniferous forest interior with upward tree view

events.description: hard cut transitions from industrial yard to interior of dense foggy forest looking upward at tree canopy

agents.ego_description: looking upward into the dense foggy canopy of tall pine trees

entered.detail: tall straight pine tree trunk rising vertically into the foggy canopy above
dark pine branches framing the left side of the view
dark pine branches framing the right side of the view

segments.scene_description: The scene cuts to a dense forest interior with an upward perspective focused on a tall pine tree trunk rising into the fog. Dark pine branches frame the left and right sides while heavy fog obscures the canopy above. The atmosphere remains consistently misty and dim, maintaining the somber tone from the previous scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from a desolate industrial yard into the claustrophobic depths of a misty forest. It begins with a static view of a gravel lot dominated by a large red warehouse with KALEVALA signage and a lone orange traffic cone, all shrouded in heavy, low-visibility fog. As the perspective shifts, the industrial surroundings vanish, replaced by a dense forest interior where the camera looks upward toward a towering pine tree trunk. The scene then closes in as dark pine branches frame the view, with the thick mist completely obscuring the canopy above to maintain a somber, mysterious atmosphere.
